air:Brand.Name: ECONOMY ESSENTIAL
air:Brand.air:Title: Economy Essential
ECONESSENT
air:Brand.air:Text: Upsell to Economy Essential to enjoy an extra piece of bag, select regular seats for free and be eligible for redemption upgrade

Included in your Adult fare are:
• check-in baggage 23kg x 2 pcs ˄ • Inflight meal • Inflight entertainment • Online or mobile check in • Reserve your preferred seat at no charge • Able to accrual miles/points
If the flight will be operated by another airline then the onboard product or service might be different. ˄ If the itinerary involves more than one airline, refer Fare Quote result for check-in baggage allowance

air:Brand.Name: PREMIUM ECONOMY FULLY FLEX
air:Brand.air:Title: Premium Economy Full Flex
PEFLEX
air:Brand.air:Text: Upgrade to Premium Economy Fully Flex for free of charge rebooking or refunds

Your Premium Economy Fully Flex fare includes:
· Check in 2 bags max 23kg each. · Take on board 1 bag max 126LCM. · A wider seat with extra legroom. · Amenity kit. · In seat power supply. · Larger flat entertainment screens than in the Economy cabin. · Delicious meals and full bar service. · Free of charge rebooking or refund.
If the flight will be operated by another airline then the onboard product or service described above might be different.
Upgrade to Premium Economy Full Flex for a higher level of comfort and service coupled with full fle

air:Brand.Name: BUSINESS PROMO
air:Brand.air:Title: Business promo
BIZPROMO
air:Brand.air:Text: Upgrade to Business Class for flat bed seats and much more

Your Business Promo fare includes:
· Priority check in, fast track, priority boarding, priority baggage delivery. · Lounge access. · Check in 2 bags max 32kg each. · Take on board bags. · Delicious chef designed meals accompanied by fine wines and other beverages. · A comfortable seat that converts into a 183inch (6ft) flat bed. · Stylish new bedding and amenity kit designed by The White Company. · A wide range of entertainment via a large screen TV. · Refund not permitted. - Change before/after departure permitted.
If the flight will be operated by another airline then the onboard product or service described above might be different.
Flat bed seats and much more

air:Brand.Name: Economy Flex
air:Brand.air:Title: Economy Flex
EcoFlex
air:Brand.air:Text: Economy Flex lets you choose your seats for free, and you can enjoy more baggage allowance and more flexibility to change your booking.

Economy Flex includes:
• Free seat selection and paid seat selection • Earn 0.7 Skywards Mile for every mile flown • Checked baggage allowance • Cabin baggage 1 bag up to 7kg • Regional multicourse dining • Complimentary alcoholic and non-alcoholic drinks • Up to 5,000 channels of entertainment • Free unlimited online chat messaging for Emirates Skywards Gold members • Buy great value Wi-Fi plans • Changes permitted for a fee • Refunds permitted for a fee
Please refer to the terms and conditions of the fare and the rules of the destination • Please note that if the flight is operated by another airline then the onboard product or service will vary. The content on this screen is for information purposes only. Please validate brands and ancillaries at Fare Quote.
Includes rebooking or refunds against a fee, and seat reservation

air:Brand.Name: ECONOMY LIGHT
air:Brand.air:Title: Economy Light
ECONLIGHT
air:Brand.air:Text:
Included in your Adult fare are:
• check-in baggage 23kg x 1pc ˄ • Inflight meal • Inflight entertainment • Online or mobile check in • Pay to reserve your preferred seat • Able to accrual miles/points
If the flight will be operated by another airline then the onboard product or service might be different. ˄ If the itinerary involves more than one airline, refer Fare Quote result for check-in baggage allowance

air:Brand.Name: Economy Flex Plus
air:Brand.air:Title: Economy Flex Plus
EcoFlxPlus
air:Brand.air:Text: Upgrade to Economy Flex Plus to enjoy the full flexibility to make changes to your booking, enjoy more baggage allowance, choose your seats for free, and earn more Skywards Miles.

Economy Flex Plus includes:
• Free seat selection and paid seat selection • Earn 1 Skywards Mile for every mile flown • Checked baggage allowance • Cabin baggage 1 bag up to 7kg • Regional multicourse dining • Complimentary alcoholic and non-alcoholic drinks • Up to 5,000 channels of entertainment • Free unlimited online chat messaging for Emirates Skywards Gold members • Buy great value Wi-Fi plans • Eligible to upgrade with Skywards Miles • Changes permitted free of charge • Fully refundable
Please refer to the terms and conditions of the fare and the rules of the destination • Please note that if the flight is operated by another airline then the onboard product or service will vary. The content on this screen is for information purposes only. Please validate brands and ancillaries at Fare Quote.
Includes rebooking refunds free of charge
